_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED MANUALLY FOR MCOPT UNIFIED
name: McOpt Unified
author: summerofstart
description: Runs the unified McOpt server.jar launcher with the optimizer agent embedded. The install script downloads server.jar, and the launcher downloads Paper on first start when server.paperclip.jar is missing.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e
cd /mnt/server
mkdir -p /mnt/server
curl -L -o server.jar https://github.com/summerofstart/SummrMc/releases/latest/download/server.jar
if [ ! -f eula.txt ]; then echo "eula=true" > eula.txt; fi
echo "McOpt server.jar installed. Start the server; Paper will download automatically if server.paperclip.jar is missing."

variables.name: Launcher Jar File
variables.description: The unified McOpt launcher jar from the release assets.

variables.name: Real Server Jar
variables.description: The real Paper, Purpur, or Folia server jar. It will be downloaded automatically when missing.

variables.name: PaperMC Project
variables.description: PaperMC project to download when Real Server Jar is missing. Common values: paper, folia.

variables.name: Minecraft Version
variables.description: Minecraft version to download from PaperMC when Real Server Jar is missing.

variables.name: Extra JVM Flags
variables.description: Optional extra JVM flags appended by the McOpt launcher.

variables.name: Fixed Heap MB
variables.description: Optional heap override. Leave empty to use 90% of Pterodactyl SERVER_MEMORY.
